about.label: About Us
about.title: Welcome to Azad Construction Inc
about.subtitle: At Azad Construction Inc, we bring your construction and renovation projects to life with expertise, precision, and passion. Whether it's a residential, commercial, or industrial project, our team is committed to delivering lasting, aesthetic results that meet your expectations.
about.description: We support our clients every step of the way, from planning to final completion, with a focus on quality workmanship, meeting deadlines, and transparency.

servicesPreview.label: What We Do
servicesPreview.title: Our Renovation Services
servicesPreview.subtitle: Kitchens, bathrooms, landscaping, roofing, electrical, plumbing, and much more — all from one trusted local team.

projectsPreview.label: Recent Work
projectsPreview.title: Homes We've Transformed
projectsPreview.subtitle: Every project is unique. Here's a look at some of our recent renovation work across Greater Montreal.

ctaBanner.title: Ready to Renovate Your Home?
ctaBanner.subtitle: Contact us today for a free in-home consultation. No pressure — just honest advice and a clear estimate.

servicesPage.label: What We Offer
servicesPage.title: Our Renovation Services
servicesPage.subtitle: Kitchens, bathrooms, basements, landscaping, roofing, electrical, plumbing and much more — all from one trusted local team.
servicesPage.gridSubtitle: From interior remodels to outdoor landscaping — we handle every trade under one roof so you only need one trusted contractor.

whyUs.label: Why Azad
whyUs.title: Why Homeowners Choose Us
whyUs.item1Desc: We are a Montreal-area family business — your neighbors, your community.
whyUs.item2Desc: Detailed, itemized estimates with no hidden fees or surprise change orders.
whyUs.item3Desc: We protect your home daily, clean up after ourselves, and respect your space.
whyUs.item4Desc: We stand behind every project with a workmanship warranty and post-project support.

servicesCta.title: Ready to Renovate?
servicesCta.subtitle: Book a free in-home consultation and let's talk about turning your renovation ideas into reality.

projectsPage.label: Our Portfolio
projectsPage.title: Renovation Projects
projectsPage.subtitle: From kitchen remodels to full home makeovers — every project is a reflection of our commitment to quality and our clients' vision.

contactPage.label: Get In Touch
contactPage.title: Let's Talk Renovations
contactPage.subtitle: Tell us about your project and we'll schedule a free in-home consultation at a time that works for you.
contactPage.estimateDesc: Fill out the form and one of our renovation specialists will reach out within 1 business day to discuss your project and schedule a free in-home visit.
